utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final solution. Now check each for full specification: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price; has address/description, bedrooms, bathrooms, features, school district, price, closing date. Sufficiently detailed. 
- financing: includes financing solution with terms; has program, loan amount, down payment, interest rate, term, monthly payment, amortization, arrangement fee. Fully specified. 
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs; has package, services, cost. Fully specified. 
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs; has package, services, date, cost. Fully specified. 
- setup_services: includes utility and setup services; has utilities with package/services/activation date/cost and additional setup services (school support, community integration, property survey) with costs. Fully specified. 
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown; includes property purchase, down payment, additional services, total upfront costs, monthly mortgage payment, remaining available funds. Fully specified. 
All 6 items are present and fully specified.
